description: My overall experience with RemoveBG is good since i use it for many years without any problem.
author: Yasin Can Y.
pros: I think it is useful and better than other websites, which are complicated and not doing the job well.
cons: Render quality might be better and sometimes make mistakes while removing background because of confusing similar colors on photos.

review_title: excellent tool for removing background from images
description: I discovered this tool when I needed to use some resources to create simple artwork for my social media about 3 years ago. I've been using it ever since and always getting great results. The first time I used the tool I was surprised by the result and the speed of achieving that result, as before I spent hours in heavier programs clicking point by point to remove the background of the images. On the tool's website, just drag and paste and that's it. download and use the image. It's incredible!
author: MATEUS D.
pros: Free tool that helps you remove background from images in a simplified and quick way. Excellent for content creators looking for a simpler and faster alternative to removing the background of an image to be used in graphic art for social networks that does not need to be of very high quality.
cons: Despite the ease that this tool provides, when it comes to more professional graphic art that requires higher image quality, as it will be used on a printed banner or flayer. This tool may not meet your needs in the free version.

description: Very, very bad. Look there are a lot of providers of this out there, choose another one.
author: Taylor H.
pros: The product was adequate, but nothing special compared to others.
cons: Dealing with [sensitive content hidden] at customer service. We hadn't used the product, and tried to cancel/transition off of it. We made a mistake, truly believing it was cancelled and he was very unhelpful.

review_title: Veloce , intuitivo e professionale ! Rimuovo gli sfondi facilmente con il mio Mac
description: Lo utilizzo spesso per immagini social professionali, ma da preparare al volo !
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Lo uso sul mio Mac dove ho istallato agevolmente l'App !! Interfaccia veloce, intuitiva e drag and drop . La rimozione degli sfondi delle foto è immediata e molto precisa. Per applicare sfondi personalizzati colorati, si può procedere gratuitamente senza problemi, per applicare sfondi professionali ad alta risoluzione si acquistano dei crediti che vengono scalati dal tuo account ad ogni utilizzo. Il prezzo dei crediti è molto interessante e si comprano a pacchetti. Per lavori professionali lo consiglio !
cons: Non ho incontrato alcuna difficoltà e tutto risponde al meglio in base alle mie esigenze, che ritengo essere esigenze grafiche anche discretamente evolute.

review_title: easy simple and fast, remove backgrounds in one click
author: Shlomo W.
pros: it's simple and genius. you just upload an image and it's all done perfectly in seconds
cons: I'm just happy nothing there is nothing wrong to say

description: It is easy to use and having variety of different backgrounds which ar very essential for the work
author: Ameen U.
pros: Mostly like it's easy for using to change the background of a picture.it is user friendly
cons: It not very advanced as free use but if we use as a premium version it has advanced features

author: Hamadou T.
pros: I like its simplicity and the fact that it can be used free of charge, which is convenient for users like me. What's more, its API is easy to integrate and comes at an affordable price.
cons: The fact that they reduce image quality in the free version, but I understand it to a certain extent

review_title: Drag and Drop to Remove Backgrounds
description: Very positive. The only time I find it not working is when I ask too much of RemoveBG. For example, uploading an image that has no clear foreground or background.
author: Jeff A.
pros: RemoveBG, at least with the free edition, has no log in and you simply drag and drop a photo in and it removes the background. This is super easy, and works really well most of the time.
cons: I dont blame them, but they have a paid version for better quality images. I wish I could get HD images for free, but really the SD is great for how I use it.

description: RemoveBG has stepped my professional game up. It has taken my designs for my decks and flyers to better heights.
author: Rashawnda D.
pros: I like the fact that I can make my work look like something from Photoshop through its automatically cropped images.
cons: I wish the resolutions were bigger for the free trial. Also, you could see the last 10 images or so to be edited and the backgrounds could be updated more.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
